mapper.sql: select record_id, user_id, course_id, chapter_id, resource_id, behavior_type, duration_seconds, progress_rate, device_type, source_page, create_time from sc_study_record
mapper.insert: insert into sc_study_record(user_id, course_id, chapter_id, resource_id, behavior_type, duration_seconds, progress_rate, device_type, source_page, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{resourceId}, #{behaviorType}, #{durationSeconds}, #{progressRate}, #{deviceType}, #{sourcePage}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from sc_study_record where record_id in #{recordId}
